name: Mobile Use
description: iOS simulator workbench with agent-drivable build, install, launch, and UI control.

agent.bootstrap: Use `set_active_simulator` and `set_active_project` to pin per-workspace defaults. The agent finds .xcodeproj paths via its own tools; device-use is a dumb executor. Call `snapshot` before `tap` to get @ref targets. Build/install/launch can be chained via the composite `run` tool.

requires.name: xcrun
requires.install: Install Xcode from the App Store and run `xcode-select --install`.
